title: Migrate repository runtime state to .takt with compatibility symlink
description: Move the checked-in runtime state directory from `.orchestrator/` to `.takt/` and add a root-level `.orchestrator -> .takt` symlink so active sessions and existing worktrees continue to resolve during the transition.
acceptance_criteria: A `.takt/` directory exists in the repository root and contains the migrated runtime state.
A `.orchestrator` symlink exists in the repository root pointing to `.takt`.
No runtime state files are left stranded only under the old non-symlink `.orchestrator/` path.
The migration does not change bead JSON schema or internal config structure.
